blockingIssues.description: Trust architecture was not added to the football, basketball, or concert listing pages, so required listing-surface Buyer Protection / trust messaging coverage remains incomplete.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce in marketplace-worker review expectations that milestone handoffs must include agent-browser interactive evidence whenever the skill requires browser validation, and scrutiny should treat missing browser evidence as a procedural issue even when curl checks pass.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The original feature review for guest-browsing-and-trust-foundation found the worker handoff relied only on curl-based verification despite marketplace-worker requiring agent-browser validation; the subsequent fix feature corrected this by including browser evidence.
